title: CCL - Close/reopen the app
scenario: CCL (Call Control Level) setting does not persist after closing and reopening the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a Bluetooth audio device that supports Call Control Level (CCL) is connected.
From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
Locate the Call Control Level (CCL) setting and select a value (e.g., High, Medium, or Low).
Close the Poly Studio Mobile app completely (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate back to Device Settings → Advanced for the same connected device.
expected: The previously selected Call Control Level (CCL) setting is retained and displayed as the current value.
